g.title: ExecuteUbergraph_TOOLTIP_Season_EventBonus__53
g.text: SourceString = Find Season Events during missions and complete them to get Plaguehearts. Collect 6 to earn a Scrip!

g.title: ExecuteUbergraph_TOOLTIP_Season_EventBonus__215
g.text: SourceString = You found enough Plaguehearts to claim this Scrip. Damn fine work!

g.title: ExecuteUbergraph_TOOLTIP_Season_EventBonus__339
g.text: SourceString = You have already claimed this Scrip. Exchange it for items from the Cosmetic Tree!

g.title: ExecuteUbergraph_TOOLTIP_Season_EventBonus__985
g.text: SourceString = You have claimed all Scrips from this row. Exchange them for items from the Cosmetic Tree!

g.title: ExecuteUbergraph_TOOLTIP_Season_EventBonus__1133
g.text: SourceString = Complete and claim the first row of Scrip to access this Event Bonus
